sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 18.114 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.18)

statement.latex: Does there exist an irreducible$5'$-subgroup$G$of$GL(V)$for some finite${ F} _5$-space$V$such that the number of conjugacy classes of the semidirect product$VG$is equal to$|V|$but$G$is not cyclic? Such a subgroup exists if 5 is replaced by$p=2, 3$but does not exist for primes$p>5$( , { 14} (2011), 175--199).

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory IV_PROBLEM_UNDEFINED; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
